repair_actions: Rebuild export after all ledger-declared proof/lock/receipt/handoff outputs already exist; then validate ZIP contents against ledger outputs.
Ensure final PASS receipt is written before zipping; do not zip pending/export_ready receipts.
Replace placeholder SHA/size with explicit external_sidecar_required policy and verified sidecar binding.
Rewrite export metadata with lifecycle-labeled heads: pre_export_head, exported_tree_head, metadata_commit_head, final_lock_head, current_working_head.
Create sidecar after final ZIP and bind it from internal manifest using external_sidecar_required metadata.
Use deterministic packaging policy: sorted entries, no caches, no nested .git, no duplicates, declared exclusions.
Resolve or quarantine conflicting active pointer-like registry artifacts before stable export lock.
Include the machine-readable PASS validator decision as a required precondition for claiming recovery-proven status.
note: G4 does not repair the ZIP. G4 proves and records the failures; G5 performs the repaired export.
